word: H4754 - מָרָא - mârâʼ - maw-raw' - Be filthy

sections.paragraph:
Original: מרא

Transliteration: mârâ'

Phonetic: maw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Hiphil) to beat (the air), flap (the wings)
    1. meaning dubious
  2. (Qal) filthy

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1238

Part(s) of speech: Verb
